sourceMovie.title: Promising Young Woman
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Promising Young Woman (2020) stuck because it commits to its thriller premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Emerald Fennell's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The thriller and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Silence of the Lambs
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Promising Young Woman clicked for you, The Silence of the Lambs (1991) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Promising Young Woman?
faq.answer: Try The Silence of the Lambs, Cape Fear, The Last House on the Left—each shares DNA with Promising Young Woman while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Promising Young Woman?
faq.answer: Promising Young Woman (2020) is best described as Thriller, Crime, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Promising Young Woman worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this thriller lane.
